info.name: NY Prepaid Subscription - Pooled Flow
info.description:
End-to-end prepaid subscription flow (non-category-scoped / pooled balance).

A fresh CAR driver subscribes to a PREPAID_SUBSCRIPTION plan, the mock Juspay auto-CHARGES the order, payment status is polled to trigger webhook processing, the subscription becomes ACTIVE, and a full ride cycle (accept → start → end) is completed. After ride end the driver's RideCredit balance is asserted to be lower than the initial balance.

── PREREQUISITE SQL (run once against local DB, adapted for NAMMA_YATRI_PARTNER / Bangalore) ──

-- Q1: Enable prepaid at merchant level
UPDATE atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant
SET prepaid_subscription_and_wallet_enabled = true
WHERE short_id = 'NAMMA_YATRI_PARTNER';

-- Q2: Set prepaid threshold in transporter_config.subscription_config
UPDATE atlas_driver_offer_bpp.transporter_config
SET subscription_config = jsonb_set(
  COALESCE(subscription_config::jsonb, '{}'),
  '{prepaidSubscriptionThreshold}', '100.0'
)
WHERE merchant_operating_city_id IN (
  SELECT id FROM atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant_operating_city
  WHERE merchant_short_id = 'NAMMA_YATRI_PARTNER' AND city = 'Bangalore'
);

-- Q3: Disable old subscription toggle (no YATRI_SUBSCRIPTION conflict)
UPDATE atlas_driver_offer_bpp.transporter_config tc
SET subscription = false, updated_at = now()
FROM atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant_operating_city moc
JOIN atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant m ON m.id = moc.merchant_id
WHERE tc.merchant_operating_city_id = moc.id
  AND m.short_id = 'NAMMA_YATRI_PARTNER'
  AND moc.city = 'Bangalore';

-- Q4: Insert PREPAID_SUBSCRIPTION config row (skip if already exists)
INSERT INTO atlas_driver_offer_bpp.subscription_config (
  service_name, merchant_operating_city_id, merchant_id,
  allow_driver_fee_calc_schedule, allow_due_addition, allow_manual_payment_links,
  deep_link_expiry_time_in_minutes, generic_batch_size_for_jobs,
  generic_job_reschedule_time, is_triggered_at_end_ride, max_retry_count,
  payment_link_channel, payment_link_job_time, payment_service_name,
  send_deep_link, send_in_app_fcm_notifications, use_overlay_service,
  payout_service_name, default_city_vehicle_category,
  number_of_free_trial_rides, free_trial_rides_applicable,
  subscription_enabled_for_vehicle_categories, execution_enabled_for_vehicle_categories,
  is_subscription_enabled_at_category_level, enable_city_based_fee_switch,
  subscription_down, is_ui_enabled, autopay_enabled, show_manual_plans_in_ui,
  send_manual_payment_link_job_max_delay, manual_payment_link_rate_limit_expiry_seconds,
  enable_offers_for_members, created_at, updated_at
)
SELECT
  'PREPAID_SUBSCRIPTION', moc.id, m.id,
  false, false, false, 15, 30, 60, true, 4,
  'WHATSAPP', 21600, 'Payment_Juspay',
  false, true, true, 'Payout_Juspay', 'CAR',
  0, false,
  ARRAY['CAR','AUTO_CATEGORY','MOTORCYCLE']::text[], ARRAY['CAR','AUTO_CATEGORY','MOTORCYCLE']::text[],
  true, false, false, true, false, true,
  43200, 21600, false, now(), now()
FROM atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant m
JOIN atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant_operating_city moc ON moc.merchant_id = m.id
WHERE m.short_id = 'NAMMA_YATRI_PARTNER' AND moc.city = 'Bangalore'
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

-- Q5: Disable YATRI_SUBSCRIPTION UI (prevents conflicting plan list)
UPDATE atlas_driver_offer_bpp.subscription_config sc
SET is_ui_enabled = false, updated_at = now()
FROM atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant_operating_city moc
JOIN atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant m ON m.id = moc.merchant_id
WHERE sc.merchant_operating_city_id = moc.id
  AND sc.service_name = 'YATRI_SUBSCRIPTION'
  AND m.short_id = 'NAMMA_YATRI_PARTNER'
  AND moc.city = 'Bangalore';

-- Q6: Insert PREPAID CAR plan (₹1 registration for easy local testing, ₹5000 credits, 2-day validity)
INSERT INTO atlas_driver_offer_bpp.plan (
  id, merchant_id, merchant_op_city_id, payment_mode, plan_type,
  name, description, max_amount, registration_amount, plan_base_amount,
  is_offer_applicable, max_credit_limit, free_ride_count, frequency,
  cgst_percentage, sgst_percentage, max_mandate_amount,
  subscribed_flag_toggle_allowed, is_deprecated, eligible_for_coin_discount,
  service_name, based_on_entity, vehicle_category, allow_strike_off,
  product_ownership_amount, billing_type, validity_in_days, is_fleet_owner_plan
)
SELECT
  gen_random_uuid()::text, m.id, moc.id::text, 'MANUAL', 'SUBSCRIPTION',
  'ECONOMY', 'Enjoy rides worth 5000 in 1!', 0, 1, 'RECHARGE_5000.0',
  true, 5000, 0, 'FLEXIBLE',
  0.09, 0.09, 0,
  true, false, true,
  'PREPAID_SUBSCRIPTION', 'RIDE', 'CAR', true,
  0, 'PREPAID', 2, false
FROM atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant m
JOIN atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant_operating_city moc ON moc.merchant_id = m.id
WHERE m.short_id = 'NAMMA_YATRI_PARTNER' AND moc.city = 'Bangalore';

── DRIVER-LEVEL SETUP (run after Driver Auth + OTP steps complete) ──

After the 'Driver OTP Verify' step, the driver_id is printed to the console.
Run this SQL to enable PREPAID_SUBSCRIPTION for that driver:

UPDATE atlas_driver_offer_bpp.driver_information
SET services_enabled_for_subscription = ARRAY['PREPAID_SUBSCRIPTION']::text[],
    updated_at = now()
WHERE driver_id = '<paste driver_id from console here>';

exec: // Auto-skip mock-server requests when envType is not Local.
// Generate random test phone numbers and registration ONCE per collection run
console.log('[Prepaid] Test driver:', dNum, '| rider:', rNum, '| reg:', regNo);
